criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on platforms like Google Play Store and Apple App Store.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across platforms.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level and effectiveness of AI integration in the app's features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and usefulness of features offered by the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's interface.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, app screenshots

criteria.name: Security
criteria.description: Level of security and data protection offered by the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, security audits, tech blogs

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: Unique and innovative features that set the app apart from competitors.
criteria.sources: Tech blogs, app descriptions, user reviews
